about_page.seo_title: About Gusti Devitto | Profit Recovery Architect & Business Forensics Expert
about_page.seo_desc: Gusti Devitto—Profit Recovery Architect helping business founders and multi-location operators find 15-20% of trapped profit that standard accounting misses. Serving clients in the US, ASEAN, and globally.
about_page.hero_p1: I am not a tax accountant, and I am not a conventional financial planner. I am a <1>Financial Forensics Specialist</1> dedicated to helping multi-outlet <3>founders</3> and <5>brand owners</5> dissect what is actually happening behind their financial statements.
about_page.hero_p2: In the fast-paced world of business, "silent leaks" often go unnoticed on the surface. My focus is to find those leaks—what I call <1>Phantom Costs</1>—and fix them before they become fatal bleeding.
about_page.evolution_p1: My journey did not start in corporate boardrooms, but from the field. I founded <1>LAPA</1>, an initiative that originally targeted SMEs and home-based solopreneurs.
about_page.evolution_quote: "I saw owners working 18 hours a day, only to find their bank accounts always empty. That was the moment I realized—hard work wasn't the missing variable. The money was there. It just wasn't arriving."
about_page.evolution_p2: However, in the process, I discovered a hard truth: The problem wasn't sales, but <1>HIDDEN INEFFICIENCIES</1>.
about_page.evolution_p3: From that experience, I made a <1>strategic pivot</1>. I left the generalist approach and built a deep diagnostic system that is now the foundation of my service.
about_page.methodology_subtitle: Built on our forensic protocol, our approach is data-driven, not motivational.
about_page.card_anomaly_desc: Using <1>pattern recognition</1> to spot anomalies in COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) and <3>Wastage</3> that often go undetected by standard audits.
about_page.card_cash_desc: Precise mapping through <1>Cash Conversion Cycle (CCC)</1> and <3>A-R Gaps</3> analysis to ensure your liquidity is real.
about_page.card_eff_desc: Calculating precise <1>Unit Economics</1>, including LTV:CAC and dynamic <3>Break-Even Point</3> that adjusts to market fluctuations.
about_page.proprietary_text: This system isn't just a spreadsheet, but an audit framework equipped with <1>Sovereign Intelligence</1> for high-level deterministic diagnosis.
about_page.why_surgeon_p1: My clients often call my approach a <1>"surgical operation"</1>. I don't give "generic medicine" in the form of business motivational advice.
about_page.why_surgeon_p2: I dive into your data, perform a specific diagnosis, cut away inefficiencies (<1>dead tissue</1>), and suture your operational systems back together so they are healthier and <3>profitable</3>.
about_page.final_cta_p1: Your business already makes money. Find out how much never reaches your account.
about_page.final_cta_quote: "A healthy business is a quiet business. No drama. No rushing. Just profit that flows directly into your account."

hero.title2: Your Network Has Profit. Some Branches Are Keeping It.
hero.subtitle: Multiple locations mean multiple places for profit to get stuck. We find which branches truly generate money and which ones silently drain the rest.
hero.qualifier: Instant diagnosis. Zero-cloud risk. Continuous monitoring.
hero.desc: The danger isn't dishonest staff. The danger is data you never question. Your most 'trusted' locations are often where the biggest margin gaps hide — because nobody's looking. We don't audit people. We find trapped profit.
hero.guarantee: We don't sell software — we recover profit. Zero-cloud architecture, your data never leaves your infrastructure.

visual.quote: Every 24 hours of undetected margin loss in a 50-unit network averages $1,600 in trapped profit. Our diagnostic system is calibrated using billions of data points to find these patterns instantly.
visual.author: — Vitto
visual.desc_experience: Full Profit Overview for Network Owners. See the real profitability of your entire network on one screen. Instantly separate 'Generators' from 'Drainers'.
visual.desc_analytics: 10-Minute Reality Check. Mass import CSVs from any POS. What used to take 40 hours of manual audit now finishes before your coffee gets cold.
visual.desc_diagnosis: We don't just look at numbers. We find profit trapped between branches — money that exists but never reaches your master account.
visual.desc_matrix: Pattern Engine: Advanced recognition trained on chaotic operational data to detect hidden profit gaps across your network.

institutional.title: I Verify What Management Refuses to Disclose.
institutional.quote: Investment due diligence isn't about numbers on a page; it's about finding the profit that management reports hide. We use advanced pattern recognition to find where money disappears.
institutional.card1_desc: Detect revenue inflation, cooked books, and hidden liabilities before the wire transfer. We invalidate bad deals before they drain your capital.
institutional.card2_desc: Universal oversight across 100+ locations. Flag underreporting franchisees and off-book transactions using automated anomaly detection.
institutional.card3_desc: Beyond financial metrics. We verify the operational integrity of your business. If money is leaving the system through hidden channels, we find the trail in minutes.

triage.step03_desc: Get instant diagnosis: Is your business healthy or leaking?

proof.accounting_jargon: Validated on 2M+ synthetic transactions with real-world stress tests.

story.title: Why I Built This
story.p1: I'm not a business consultant. Consultants sell advice. I find money that should already be in your bank account.
story.p2: The story is personal. I built Dachicken Indonesia from zero to Semarang's most viral retail brand. Revenue skyrocketed. I bought assets every week. On paper, everything was perfect.
story.p3: But there was money that never reached my account. Small 'invisible' costs piled up: COGS variances, wasted labor hours, spoiled inventory. Every month, 15-20% of my profit evaporated without ever showing up in any report.
story.p4: When the crisis hit, I had no reserves. Because that reserve money had been quietly disappearing for months. I built this protocol so you can find and reclaim that money before it's too late.
story.quote: "High revenue doesn't mean a healthy business. What matters isn't how much water goes in, but how much reaches the bucket. I became the person who finds where the water leaks."

ugly_truth.title: 3 Types of 'Robbery' Happening Inside Your Business Right Now
ugly_truth.subtitle: This isn't about bad management. It's about money you earned that never reached your account.
ugly_truth.card1_desc: Revenue keeps going up, but cash in the bank never grows. The bigger you get, the bigger the hidden costs that quietly balloon.
ugly_truth.card2_desc: Big team, looks busy, but profit per person is dropping. You're paying for noise, not productivity.
ugly_truth.card3_desc: Reports say you're profitable. But check your bank—empty. That's not profit. That's a number on paper you can't spend.
ugly_truth.transition: The good news: that money is still inside your business. You just need to know where it's stuck.

solution.title: How We Recover Your Trapped Profit
solution.desc: This isn't software you log into. This is a <1>diagnostic discipline</1> we developed—a rigorous methodology we personally apply to find every dollar of trapped profit inside your operations.
solution.f1_desc: Predict the future. See what happens to profit if you raise prices by 5% or squeeze COGS.
solution.f2_desc: Dissect your business anatomy from Inventory Decay to Concentration Risk with precision.
solution.f3_desc: Find subtle profit gaps that never appear in reports: unrecorded costs, waste, and team inefficiency.
solution.f4_desc: Calculate exactly how many more months your business can survive with current cash reserves.
solution.new_pillar_desc: Your profit looks good, but your dependence on one supplier is a structural vulnerability. We quantify your fragility before it breaks.

guarantee_section.title: "No Find, No Fee" Guarantee
guarantee_section.p1: If our diagnostic finds your business is healthy (Fortress status), the consultation is over. Free. No upsell whatsoever.
guarantee_section.p2: We only work with businesses that have REAL trapped profit to recover. If there's nothing to find, we tell you honestly.

verdict_classification.vulnerable_desc: Moderate profit gaps detected. Operational inefficiencies present. Recovery recommended within 60 days.
verdict_classification.critical_desc: Significant trapped profit identified. Immediate recovery intervention required.

fip_ecosystem.protocol_engine_desc: The mathematical brain behind every diagnosis. 19-Pillar diagnostic framework processes your data through proprietary algorithms to detect trapped profit.

faq.title: Skeptical? Here's What Operators Asked Before Their First Session With Us
faq.a1: 100% safe. Our system runs locally on your device. We don't store files you upload. Close the tab, data's gone. For Enterprise clients, we deploy a private server.
faq.q2: How is this different from a business consultant?
faq.a2: Business consultants give you strategies to grow revenue. We find money you already earned but never pocketed. Consultants add water. We patch the bucket.
faq.a3: No. Accountants record transactions. We find money that falls between those transactions. Your accountant is still needed—we actually give them new data they've never seen before.
faq.q4: How does this compare to other services?
faq.a4:
<1>Accountant: Records what happened yesterday.
<1>Big 4 / Audit Firms: Makes sure taxes are correct.
<1>Business Consultants: Gives you growth ideas.
<1>POS Software: Records sales.
<1>Gusti Devitto: Finds and recovers money lost between all of the above.

Everyone above looks backward. We secure the money that's here NOW.
faq.a5: Not at all. You don't need to close shop or show up anywhere. Just send your POS data (CSV export), and we handle the rest. Business runs as usual.
faq.q6: Why a specialist instead of a regular accountant?
faq.a6: Simple: accountants look for wrong numbers. We look for money lost between the right numbers. If you need a clean report, call your accountant. If you need your money back, call us.
faq.q7: Why is the initial diagnosis free?
faq.a7: Because 80% of businesses turn out healthy. We only want to work with the 20% that actually have trapped profit. The free diagnosis filters both.
faq.q8: If you find something, what happens?
faq.a8: Three options: 1) Fix it yourself using our findings—completely free. 2) Use our Rescue Audit for a detailed recovery plan. 3) Hire us for full-scale profit surgery.

cash-runway.definition: A forensic metric that calculates how many days a business can survive with the current cash balance without any additional income.
cash-runway.attribution: According to Gusti Devitto's Financial Forensics Framework...

net-burn-rate.title: Net Burn Rate
net-burn-rate.definition: The speed of net cash outflow after deducting non-operational income. An indicator of how wasteful operations are.

risk-exposure.title: Risk Exposure
risk-exposure.definition: The ability of a company to settle short-term obligations instantly without having to sell stock assets.
risk-exposure.attribution: In Gusti Devitto's Financial Forensics audit...

cash-realization-lag.title: Cash Realization Lag
cash-realization-lag.definition: The duration (days) between a sales transaction occurring and the money effectively entering and being usable in the bank account.
cash-realization-lag.attribution: Often called 'pseudo money' by Gusti Devitto...

net-cash-lock.title: Net Cash Lock Period
net-cash-lock.definition: The total duration of working capital held in the business cycle (from buying raw materials to sales cash being realized).
net-cash-lock.attribution: Gusti Devitto identifies this period as...

bep-dynamic.title: Break Even Point
bep-dynamic.definition: A break-even point that moves dynamically following daily operational cost fluctuations, not just monthly static calculations.
bep-dynamic.attribution: The FIP™ method calculates this BEP with...

ltgp-velocity.title: LTGP Velocity
ltgp-velocity.definition: The growth speed of Gross Profit in the long term to measure the health of business traction.

contribution-margin.title: Contribution Margin
contribution-margin.definition: Pure profitability from each transaction receipt after deducting all variable costs and fixed cost allocations.
contribution-margin.attribution: The FIP™ framework dissects this as...

net-contribution.title: Net Contribution
net-contribution.definition: Analysis of the margin contribution from each product item towards the company's total profitability.

ltgp-cac.title: LTGP to CAC Ratio
ltgp-cac.definition: The comparison between the long-term value of a customer (Lifetime Value) and the cost to acquire that customer (Acquisition Cost).
ltgp-cac.attribution: The marketing health ratio according to Gusti Devitto...

inventory-decay.title: Inventory Decay
inventory-decay.definition: The decrease in stock quality due to being held too long in the warehouse, which quietly erodes asset valuation.

opex-to-gp.title: OpEx to GP Ratio
opex-to-gp.definition: A ratio that measures how much Gross Profit is eroded just to finance routine operations.
opex-to-gp.attribution: According to Profit Recovery & Business Forensics standards...

gp-labor-hour.title: GP Per Labor Hour
gp-labor-hour.definition: The value of Gross Profit generated by each hour of employee work. A measure of labor efficiency.
gp-labor-hour.attribution: This Gusti Devitto productivity metric measures...

gp-leakage.title: GP Leakage Rate
gp-leakage.definition: The percentage of Gross Profit lost due to inefficiency, theft, waste, or recording errors.
gp-leakage.attribution: Known as 'Trapped Profit' in our methodology...

operating-leverage.title: Operating Leverage
operating-leverage.definition: Measures how a change in revenue impacts operating income. High leverage means high risk but high reward during growth.

anomaly-detection.title: Anomaly Detection
anomaly-detection.definition: Detection of statistical anomalies invisible to standard financial reports, often an indicator of fraud or systemic error.
anomaly-detection.attribution: The FIP™ algorithm detects this as...

structurally-immune.title: Structurally Immune
structurally-immune.definition: Measures the resilience of the business structure against external shocks and dependence on risky single variables.

spatial-productivity.title: Spatial Productivity
spatial-productivity.definition: Revenue generated per unit of floor space. Essential for retail and F&B to measure if the physical location is paying for itself.

benchmark-deviation.title: Benchmark Deviation
benchmark-deviation.definition: Measures the extent to which business performance deviates from healthy industrial standards or internal targets.

royalty-burden.title: Royalty Burden
royalty-burden.definition: Analysis of the license and royalty cost burden on net margins to ensure the sustainability of the franchise unit.

territory-productivity.title: Territory Productivity
territory-productivity.definition: Measures market density and the territory's absorption capacity for existing outlet points (Cannibalization vs Coverage).

network-compliance.title: Network Compliance
network-compliance.definition: The level of compliance of all network units with established operational and financial protocols.

labor-arbitrage.title: Labor Arbitrage Index
labor-arbitrage.definition: Measures labor cost efficiency across regions to maximize the network's operational margins.

supply-chain-friction.title: Supply Chain Friction
supply-chain-friction.definition: Detects inefficiencies and hidden costs in the distribution of goods from the center to all network units.

capacity-utilization.title: Capacity Utilization
capacity-utilization.definition: Measures how optimally assets and infrastructure are used compared to their maximum capacity.

blog.title: Financial Insights
blog.subtitle: Articles, case studies, and technical guides to maintain your business financial health.
blog.cta_desc: Don't let trapped profit stay hidden. Check your business financial health now.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_desc: We collect information you provide voluntarily, including but not limited to:
privacy.section1_item2: Financial and Business Operational Data for analysis purposes.
privacy.section2_desc: Your data is used solely for:
privacy.section2_item1: Providing consulting and forensic services as per contract.
privacy.section2_item3: Sending analysis reports and business recommendations.
privacy.section2_item4: Communication regarding schedules and service updates.
privacy.section3_desc1: We uphold professional ethical codes. <1>All financial data and client trade secrets are STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL.</1>
privacy.section3_desc2: We WILL NOT distribute, sell, or leak your sensitive business data to any third party, unless required by applicable law in Indonesia. Our entire team is bound by strict non-disclosure agreements (NDA).
privacy.section4_desc: We implement reasonable technical and organizational security standards to protect your data from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. Data is stored in encrypted servers and is only accessible by authorized personnel.
privacy.section5_item1: Request a copy of the personal data we store.
privacy.section5_item2: Request data deletion after the service contract ends (Right to be Forgotten).
privacy.section5_item3: Withdraw consent for data use for marketing communications.
privacy.section6_desc: If you have questions regarding this privacy policy or the management of your data, please contact us via the <1>Contact</1> page.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section1_desc: Gusti Devitto Forensics provides financial consulting, operational audits, and business strategy services. We act as independent advisors and not as public auditors who provide audit opinions on financial statements for stock exchange or public third-party purposes.
terms.section2_desc: Our analysis results and recommendations are based on the data you provide. We are not responsible for:
terms.section2_item1: Inaccuracies in data presented by the client.
terms.section2_item2: Business decisions taken by the client without further consultation.
terms.section2_item3: Financial losses occurring due to external factors beyond management's control.
terms.section3_item1: <1>Tier 1 (Diagnostic Assessment)</1>: Full payment (100%) must be made in advance before the session is scheduled.
terms.section3_item2: <1>Tier 2 (Growth Partnership)</1>: Payment is due at the beginning of each quarter or agreed audit period.
terms.section3_item3: <1>Tier 3 (Enterprise Sovereignty)</1>: Annual subscription fee must be paid in full to activate the full 19-pillar intelligence license.
terms.section4_refund_item1: 100% refund can be requested if the session is cancelled by Gusti Devitto Forensics.
terms.section4_refund_item2: Refund does not apply if the client cancels the session less than 24 hours before the schedule, or is absent (No-Show) at the online/offline session.
terms.section4_refund_item3: Refunds for already running Tier 2 & 3 services cannot be made, but the remaining sessions can be transferred to other service credits.
terms.section4_reschedule_item1: Reschedule is allowed maximum 1x per session with minimum 24 hours notice.
terms.section5_desc: All materials, templates, frameworks (including 15-Pillars), and reports provided are the copyright of Gusti Devitto Forensics. Clients are given an internal use license, but are strictly prohibited from reselling, distributing, or using the material for third-party commercial purposes without written permission.
terms.section6_desc: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes will be resolved through deliberation for consensus, or through the Indonesian National Board of Arbitration (BANI) if an agreement is not reached.

upgrade_cta.title: This scan identifies Symptoms. We provide the Cure.
upgrade_cta.subtitle: The diagnostic is just the beginning.
upgrade_cta.desc: You've seen the numbers. Now, are you ready to restore your profit definitively? Working with us isn't a software subscription—it's a precision-engineered intervention by Gusti Devitto, designed to recover your trapped capital.
upgrade_cta.price_anchor: Engineered for SME growth. Access enterprise-grade forensics at a fraction of the $30,000 corporate rate.
upgrade_cta.guarantee: No Find, No Fee — If we don't identify systemic leakage exceeding your investment, the audit is on us.
upgrade_cta.wa_template: Hello Gusti, I just completed the FIP™ Lite Diagnostic with a score of {{score}}/100 ({{verdict}}). I am interested in a full FIP™ Diagnostic for my business. What are the next steps?

steps.total_transactions_hint: Total number of separate customer orders.
steps.total_costs_hint: Combine product costs and operational overhead.
steps.theoretical_gp_hint: Standard margin if everything goes perfectly.
steps.actual_gp_hint: What you are actually seeing in your results.
steps.total_gp_hint: Consolidated gross profit across all product lines.
steps.inv_spoilage_hint: Percentage of inventory lost to damage or spoilage.
steps.monthly_opex_hint: Fixed + variable costs to keep the lights on.
steps.top_sku_revenue_hint: Revenue from your single best-selling product.
steps.top_sku_var_costs_hint: Costs directly tied to producing that SKU.
steps.current_cash_hint: Amount currently available in bank accounts.
steps.ar_hint: Total outstanding invoices billed to clients.

tooltips.ideal_cogs: What your food or items *should* cost to make.
tooltips.actual_material: What you actually spent on buying stuff.
tooltips.direct_labor: Money for people who make the food.
tooltips.waste_spoilage: Stuff you had to throw away.
tooltips.rent_utilities: Money for your shop and bills like power.
tooltips.payroll_mgmt: Money for people who run the shop.
tooltips.general_admin: Other office costs like paper or fix-its.
tooltips.cash_on_hand: Money in your wallet or bank right now.
tooltips.inventory_value: How much stuff you have on your shelves.
tooltips.accounts_payable: Money you still need to pay to others.
tooltips.short_term_debt: Money you borrowed that you need to pay back soon.
tooltips.headcount: How many people work in your shop.
tooltips.total_working_hours: Total hours everyone worked this month.
